scenes.text:
Successful people do not react. They
respond. There is a massive difference.

Reacting is emotional. Responding is strategic. A chess player does not move the first piece they touch. They see five moves
ahead. Most people play checkers with their life. One move at a time, no strategy, just survival. Start playing chess.

Before you make any decision, ask yourself three questions. What happens if I do this? What
happens if I do not? What will I wish I had done in five years?

Think long game. Play long
game. Win long game.

Save this for your next big
decision. Follow for strategic thinking daily.
